task_completion.description: Verify the USLCI database is imported and active in openLCA
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA navigation panel shows the USLCI database (or a database created from the uslci_database.zip) as active or expanded.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pump Production' process is created with correct inputs and outputs
task_completion.visual_evidence: An openLCA process tab named 'Pump Production' showing an output of 1 item and an input of 50 kg of 'Steel, low-alloyed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pump Use Phase' process is created with correct inputs and outputs
task_completion.visual_evidence: An openLCA process tab named 'Pump Use Phase' showing an output of 1 item and an input of 20,000 MJ of 'Electricity, at grid, US'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pump Lifecycle' process integrates both production and use phases
task_completion.visual_evidence: An openLCA process tab named 'Pump Lifecycle' showing inputs from both the 'Pump Production' and 'Pump Use Phase' processes.

task_completion.description: Verify the LCIA calculation was run using the TRACI 2.1 method
task_completion.visual_evidence: An openLCA results window or calculation setup screen showing the 'Pump Lifecycle' being analyzed using the 'TRACI 2.1' method, specifically looking at Global Warming Air.

task_completion.description: Verify the dominance report text file is created with the correct dominant phase and ratio
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '~/LCA_Results/dominance_report.txt' containing 'Dominant Phase: Use' and 'Ratio: [value]', where the value is between 20.0 and 100.0.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the openLCA graphical interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the openLCA application open with the agent interacting with its menus, process tabs, and calculation windows.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the calculation rather than just guessing the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a screenshot showing the openLCA results tab with actual calculated impact values for the lifecycle before the text file is created.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just create the text file without interacting with openLCA
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must show openLCA usage prior to the creation and editing of the dominance_report.txt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dominant phase is 'Use'. The expected ratio of Use phase GWP to Production phase GWP is approximately 28.1. Accept any ratio value between 20.0 and 100.0. The output file must be located at /home/ga/LCA_Results/dominance_report.txt.
